sections.title: Standard dialogue after finishing Icthlarin's Little Helper

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, Siamun?

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you are Siamun then?

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: Yes now what do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, are you this friendly to everyone?

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: Just you. Now what do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A mutual friend of ours, Ali Morrisane, wants you to supply his stall in Al Kharid with your garments.

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: Now why would I do that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well for one, you'd probably sell more clothes and once the people of Al Kharid see your amazing works of tailoring, I'm sure they'd spread the word of your clothes far and wide.

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: Interesting, but I would need more materials to accomplish what you ask of me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well then what do you need?

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: Either get me 3 pots of dye, or 3 animal pelts of the same variety and whatever you do, don't bring me any certs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean by animal pelt?

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: Just get me 3 cowhides, 3 wolf or snake skins or the shearings of 3 sheep. Simpler still get me 3 pots of dye and whatever you do, don't bring me any certs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll get you the materials.

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: Unless you've got the materials on you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ummm.. No.

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: Keh! Come back when you have what I need.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yup, I've got what you want with me.

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: Thank you adventurer. I will get my goods up to that merchant thief - Ali Morrisane as quickly as possible.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Think nothing of it. I'm looking forward to seeing what you've produced for the Al Kharid market.

sections.title: When talked to again without having delivered the items

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Siamun.

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: Have you got what I asked for yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A hello would have been nice.

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: Look I'm not nice, now did you get what I asked for or not?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ummm.. No.

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: Keh! Come back when you have what I need.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Umm... What do you need again?

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: Just get me 3 cowhides, 3 wolf or snake skins or the shearings of 3 sheep. Simpler still just get me 3 pots of dye and whatever you do, don't bring me any certs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll get you the materials.

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: Unless you've got the materials on you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ummm.. No.

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: Keh! Come back when you have what I need.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yup, I've got what you want with me.

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: Thank you adventurer. I will get my goods up to that merchant thief - Ali Morrisane as quickly as possible.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Think nothing of it. I'm looking forward to seeing what you've produced for the Al Kharid market.

sections.title: When talked to again having delivered the items before talking to Ali Morrisane

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Siamun.

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: Hello adventurer. Have you checked with Ali M whether my garments are selling or not?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet, I have a few things to do first.

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: Well I would be very much obliged if you could have a talk with him sooner rather than later, I'm not all that sure of the trustworthiness of those carpet men.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry, I'll get to it.

sections.title: When talked to again after talking to Ali Morrisane

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Siamun.

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: Hello adventurer. How are sales going?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not too bad, Ali was well impressed by the reaction and demand they had initially but he's a little concerned about how the sales have dropped off of recent.

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: Hmmm... Maybe I could produce a different range of products.

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: I tell you what, get me 3 animal pelts of the same variety and I'll change the shipments around and whatever you do, don't bring me any certs.

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: I'll tell you what, get me 3 pots of dye and I'll change the type of garments I'm sending to Ali and whatever you do, don't bring me any certs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll get you the materials.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: Do you need something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: Well I have lots to do, so good day.

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I thought this acne potion might help ease your itching.

lines.speaker: Siamun
lines.text: Get away from me! I don't want your strange potions!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry.
